calendar.matters:
Petition For Order For Disbursement Of Funds Deposited With County Treasurer
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Carroll for Global Discoveries.

Mr. Carroll stated that his Client located six People in Mexico, and that they worked with and got the required documents from all six of them. In addition, he stated that his Client's fee was for 35% which was standard, that the only costs were for the court fees and that the Attorney fees were based on the work performed. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
